articles.title: McDonald's Drive-Thru AI Upgrade: How Google Is Replacing the Failed IBM Ordering System
articles.description: McDonald's has announced plans to roll out a new Google-powered AI operating system called ArchIQ across all US restaurants, featuring a drive-thru assistant named Archy that can handle orders in English and Spanish. The move comes after the chain scrapped its previous IBM-built AI ordering system in 2024 following widespread complaints about incorrect orders.

articles.description: Back in April, Google joined OpenAI and Anthropic in offering a dedicated Mac app for its AI chatbot software. Two months later, it’s clear that Gemini for Mac isn’t as good as it could be. more...

articles.title: The new AI Siri will require a waitlist to try, new report claims
articles.description: On Monday, June 8, Apple will unveil iOS 27, which is widely rumored to contain the revamped AI-infused Siri powered by Google's Gemini models. This has been a very long time coming, with the company first announcing an AI Siri back in June of 2024. That has seen delay after delay, but it's now finally (almost) here. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, the new Siri will be labeled as a beta at first, and will require you to join a waitlist in order to try it. Now it's unclear whether this waitlist will function only during the iOS 27 beta period, or will also be extended even after iOS...

articles.description: The FCC was not swayed by complaints from SpaceX, which said Amazon was asking for 'special treatment' to miss a July deadline to launch half of a 3,232-satellite constellation.

articles.title: Lil Finder Guy pet was the gateway to building my own Mac apps with Codex
articles.description: At the start of May, OpenAI released a playful feature inside its Codex desktop app for creating a virtual pet. This silly little addition solved my biggest challenge with Codex: what should I do with it? My first real task with Codex was putting together a virtual Lil Finder Guy for fun. A month later, I’m using two Mac apps that Codex built at my direction. Toying around with Codex Pets was the gateway for me to better understand its capabilities. more...

Not digital ones, but real, living insects that the Silicon Valley giant plans to release into the air. It's an initiative known humorously as the " Debug Project ." articles.title: Stay safe & browse the internet freely with 70% off Proton VPN
articles.description: Virtual Private Networks, or VPNs, are basically a required utility in 2026 if you want to browse the internet without being tracked. Get Proton VPN at up to 70% off a two-year subscription. Proton VPN can keep your browsing habits private. Image source: Proton It seems like everyone on the internet is trying to track you. Whether it's data brokers trying to profit off your personal information or your ISP attempting to help build an advertising profile, all eyes are on you when you browse. There is a better option than giving up and living in a cave, and it's called Proton VPN. It lets you connect a VPN to up to ten devices at once for smooth and encrypted access to your apps and websites. Continue Reading on AppleInsider

articles.title: Greece to tax gains from crypto, sources say
articles.description: Greece is set to introduce a 15% capital gains tax on cryptocurrencies. The Finance Ministry is drafting a law for parliamentary submission. The first 500 euros of gains will be tax-exempt. This move aims to integrate crypto assets into the nation's tax code. The tax will not apply to individual crypto mining operations.

articles.title: AI fever spreads, but are markets masking economic cracks?
articles.description: Investors are pouring money into Artificial Intelligence, even as economic worries grow. SpaceX's massive IPO signals strong AI interest. Companies like Google are expanding AI infrastructure. Chipmakers are seeing huge demand. However, some signs suggest market expectations may be too high. Analysts are watching closely to see if this AI boom can withstand inflation and slowing growth.

articles.title: Asus is putting AI in every product. It also wants you to choose when to use it
articles.description: Asus came to Computex 2026 with an answer to the AI PC noise: put intelligence everywhere, mandate nothing. Every product line—Vivobook to ProArt, entry-level to Nvidia RTX Spark—ships with AI built in. A new agent, Zenni Claw, ties it together. But the company's real position, as Director of Technical Marketing Sascha Krohn kept returning to, is simpler than the booth suggests. The AI is there. Using it is the buyer's problem.

articles.title: Martin Scorsese faces backlash after calling AI ‘Creatively Freeing’

articles.title: Grest becomes first private firm to integrate with Sanchar Saathi’s IMEI verification system
articles.description: The integration enables real-time verification of mobile devices against the government’s central IMEI database before transactions are completed. C-DOT issued a certificate of recognition to Grest on June 3, acknowledging the integration.

articles.title: $100K savings in 3 months: Techie says Claude code is now 2x faster, 3x cheaper using this tool
articles.description: A developer's Reddit post highlights GrapeRoot, a tool enhancing AI coding. It uses a dependency graph to load only relevant code, reducing token usage. This reportedly makes AI coding twice as fast and three times cheaper. Developers are showing keen interest in this open-source solution for optimizing AI interactions with large codebases, potentially saving significant costs.

articles.title: Audi Nuvolari revealed: 1,000hp hybrid hypercar, stunning design & no phone-like boring design
articles.description: Built around a spaceframe chassis, the Nuvolari is the first production Audi to feature an extensively carbon-fibre exterior. Most body panels are made from carbon-fibre-reinforced polymer, while heat-resistant materials are used in high-temperature areas. At the rear, the Nuvolari gets a full-width lighting element, a large diffuser and an active rear wing that automatically adjusts according to speed and driving conditions to enhance stability.

articles.title: Humanoid robot kicks child in viral video, netizens say Terminator is just one update away| Watch
articles.description: A humanoid robot has gone viral after accidentally kicking a child in the stomach while performing a series of movements during a public demonstration. The incident has triggered concerns about the safety of increasingly capable robots. While the incident drew immediate attention, many viewers also noted the robot's improved balance and control, as it quickly stabilised itself after the mishap.
